title: kohleria longicalyx
intro: Kohleria longicalyx, also known as the 'Long-lipped Kohleria', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Kohleria longicalyx include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
